mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MENU_NO) AS RNUM , COALESCE( MENU_NO , '' ) AS MENU_NO , COALESCE( UPPER_MENU_NO , '' ) AS UPPER_MENU_NO , COALESCE( MENU_ORDR , '' ) AS MENU_ORDR , COALESCE( MENU_NM , '' ) AS MENU_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_FILE_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_FILE_NM , COALESCE( MENU_DC , '' ) AS MENU_DC FROM LETTNMENUINFO WHERE 1=1
AND MENU_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND UPPER_MENU_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MENU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MENU_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A1

SELECT COUNT(1) AS LIST_CNT FROM (SELECT MENU_NO FROM LETTNMENUINFO WHERE 1=1
AND MENU_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND UPPER_MENU_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MENU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MENU_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A1

SELECT COALESCE( MENU_NO , '' ) AS MENU_NO , COALESCE( UPPER_MENU_NO , '' ) AS UPPER_MENU_NO , COALESCE( MENU_ORDR , '' ) AS MENU_ORDR , COALESCE( MENU_NM , '' ) AS MENU_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_FILE_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_FILE_NM , COALESCE( MENU_DC , '' ) AS MENU_DC , COALESCE( RELATE_IMAGE_PATH , '' ) AS RELATE_IMAGE_PATH , COALESCE( RELATE_IMAGE_NM , '' ) AS RELATE_IMAGE_NM FROM LETTNMENUINFO WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo}
